CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Oct-16-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Sonia Wong, CSR#11288.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, NEWLOGIC BUSINESS LOANS, INC.
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) YIN SHUN TANG, aka FRED TANG, aka ALAN TANG.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $42,374.72
Pre-Judgment Interest: $3,842.91
Attorney's Fees: $2,210.00
Costs: $586.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $49,013.63
Judgment signed in open court.
